Kitchen assistant Local AI with grounded context: today's active 86s, recent inventory log, line-check progress, sign-offs, and recipe snippets that match your question. Low temperature and strict prompts reduce invention; allergen tags from the recipe book are not legal dietary advice. AI is down. Can't connect to Ollama on the office Mac. Ask a manager to start it. mainText: Thermometer calibrations FDA §4-502.11 — temp measuring device accurate within ±2°F. Ice-point = 32°F. Boiling-point at Lariat (elevation 7800 ft) ≈ 197.8°F (water boils lower at altitude). Default frequency: every 30 days per probe. Both passes and fails are recorded for the audit trail. 0 in calibration 0 due soon 0 overdue / failed 0 unknown PROBES (0) No probe has been calibrated yet. Log an ice-point or boiling-point reading below — one tile will appear per probe id. LOG A CALIBRATION THERMOMETER ID METHOD Ice-point (32°F slurry) Boiling-point (altitude-adjusted) ELEVATION FT (DEFAULTS 7800) READING °F (TARGET 32.0°F ±2) NOTE (OPTIONAL) Record calibration
Time Control For food held by time, not temp. Hot = 4 hours. Cold = 6 hours. Toss at cutoff. Item Hot or cold Hot (4h) Cold (6h) Station Batch ref Start batch Open batches No open batches.

Connect Lariat Add another device, or install the browser app when you are not in the Mac app. One-click install Use the steps below for this browser. Mac — Chrome / Edge Click the install icon in the URL bar (looks like a small screen with a down arrow) Or: ⋮ menu → Cast, save and share → Install Lariat Cockpit… Confirm. Lariat appears in /Applications and your Dock. Other devices on the network From another Mac or iPad on the same Wi-Fi, open this address: http://lariat.local:3000
